name: Garlic Green Bean Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 small Can chopped green chile peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the green beans into 2-inch lengths.
2. Boil the cut green beans until they are tender-crisp and then drain them.
3. Peel the garlic cloves and mash them with salt.
4. Mix the mashed garlic, oil, cider vinegar, minced green onions, and chopped green chile peppers in a bowl.
5. Pour the mixture over the cooked green beans while they are still hot.
6. Gently toss the beans to coat them evenly with the dressing.
7. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
